docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 FILED BY CARRASCO, NORA AS TO DEFENDANT TOWERSTREAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TOWERSTREAM
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL MAU. FILED BY CARRASCO, NORA TOWERSTREAM
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TOWERSTREAM

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRASCO, NORA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GARRET CONROY--SITE ACQUISITION MARKET MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2015 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-09-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-04-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00 SERVED SEP-15-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOWERSTREAM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRASCO, NORA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOWERSTREAM $2,484.31 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,519.31, JUDGMENT FOR $163.75 (KEYS), $320.56 (PERMIT), AND $2,000 (ROOF OF REPAIR) AS REPAIR ESTIMATE WAS EXCESSIVE. REMAINING CLAIMS ARE DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
